response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience with C++ or Rust in geospatial routing pipelines, despite claiming C++ exposure from a 2014 LabWindows role; their work is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no evidence of distributed systems, routing tile optimization, or real-time traffic integration required for the role.
strengths: Extensive open-source GIS project experience with GISCollective
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and languages
Strong track record of building scalable data systems and developer tooling
concerns: No demonstrated commercial C++ or Rust development in routing or geospatial pipelines
Lacks evidence of distributed systems, fault tolerance, or navigation data integrity work
Primary stack (TypeScript/Node.js) is misaligned with C++-centric job requirements
